shortDescription: Kraken Spot REST API public market-data integration generated from the official OpenAPI spec (ticker, OHLC candles, order book, recent trades, system status, server time)

baseUrlParam.name: baseUrl
baseUrlParam.description: Kraken REST API base URL including the version prefix

registration.label: Kraken API Key
registration.description: Kraken Spot REST API key (generated kraken-spot-api bubble). Public market-data operations work with any placeholder value; private endpoints additionally require API-Sign request signing, which this bubble does not implement.
registration.credentialComment: Kraken API key (generated kraken-spot-api bubble; public market data)
